metadata.name: Respond to a Request for Quotation (RFQ)

description: A new shipping line requests a quotation for stevedoring and other port services.

nodes.task_description: Receive the RFQ and identify the required services and estimated annual container volume.

expected_outcome.value: Sales manager logs the RFQ details.

nodes.task_description: Use the port's standard tariff or a pricing model to calculate the rates for the requested services.

expected_outcome.value: The manager determines the price per container move and other charges.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a formal quotation document and send it to the potential customer.

expected_outcome.value: A professional quotation is drafted and emailed to the shipping line.
